chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1275 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 22.01.2026 Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Asadullah Rajper, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Complainant present reiterates the contents of the affidavit of no objection filed on her behalf. Learned Assistant Attorney General on account of the nature of the offence found himself unable to extend his no objection; however, considering that the victim in the matter has compromised with the applicant and as such requires entertainment of bail, without touching the merits in the matter states that the purpose of law is to protect the victim In the present circumstances, this bail application stands allowed and the applicant is directed to be released against the surety of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand), which is to be taken by the Additional Registrar of this Court as the question of concerned Court may restrict the benefit of bail being acquired in the matter on account of where the surety is to be submitted. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
